title: litosanthes biermannii
intro: Litosanthes biermannii, also known as the Philippine or Biermann's litosanthes, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Litosanthes biermannii is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in the Philippines. In terms of herbal preparations, Litosanthes biermannii can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or infusions that can be taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
